event: Middle Eastern street scene with a donkey
description: A narrow Middle Eastern street scene bathed in warm golden light. A two-story building with an ornate wooden lattice balcony (mashrabiya) dominates the left side. At street level, a shop front is visible with a seated figure and a standing white donkey. A figure in a turban sits or stands near the doorway. Arched stone passages and architectural details suggest a historic bazaar or souk. The atmosphere is warm, with ochre and amber tones pervading the scene.
